summary: Frontend admin/public verification of new CorporateEditor (/admin/corporate) and tabbed PagesEditor (/admin/pages). Login, sidebar grouping, all 5 page tabs, cursor-jump regression, save, and public-page reflection all pass. Existing admin pages still load.

design_issues.screen: /admissions (after admin adds an extra step/fee via PagesEditor)
issues: React console warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' — likely Admissions.jsx mapping over home.admissions.steps or fees with index-only keys or duplicates. Non-blocking but should be fixed for stability.

action_items: Optional: fix React 'unique key prop' warning on /admissions — ensure step/fee rows use stable keys (e.g. n+title or generated id) instead of index when duplicates can occur.

Optional UX: in PagesEditor → Contact → 'Add topic', the newly added empty topic input is rendered AFTER the existing list, but our typing test indicated focus may land on a pre-existing input depending on locator strategy. Manual test via UI works; consider auto-focusing the freshly added input.
critical_code_review_comments: CorporateEditor.jsx and PagesEditor.jsx correctly define the inline F field component at MODULE scope (not inside the parent component), which is the right fix for the cursor-jump bug. Verified by typing multi-character strings without focus loss.

PagesEditor stores contact.subtext separately from contact.hero.subtitle; About page mixes both philosophy.paragraph1 and home.about.paragraph1 fallback paths — works but slightly confusing schema. Consider consolidating in a follow-up.
Public Corporate page does NOT poll — confirmed; admin user must hard-refresh public page to see saved changes. Acceptable behaviour but worth surfacing to end-users in admin UI as a hint.
seed_data_creation: During testing, /api/content/home was updated with eyebrow='XYZ-Corp-Eyebrow', heroTitle='Hero-Title-AAA', a whyItem 'TestWhyCard', an audience 'TestAudienceCohort', About eyebrow 'AboutEyebrowZZZ', and a contact topic suffix containing 'TestTopicQQQ'. Main agent may want to revert these via the admin UI before handing back to user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified flows: (1) admin login, (2) sidebar groups OVERVIEW/PAGES/CONTENT/OPERATIONS render, (3) /admin/corporate full CRUD on whyItems & audiences, save → reflected on /corporate including dropdown, (4) /admin/pages all 5 tabs render & save, About eyebrow + Contact topic propagate to public pages, (5) cursor-jump bug NOT reproducible (F is module-scoped), (6) all 12 existing admin sub-pages load without error. Test data prefixed XYZ/Test/AAA/ZZZ/QQQ remains in DB; clean up if needed.
